standup.name: Smit Parekh
next: Merge feat/offboarding-meeting-step to dev and deploy to stage so the new endpoints are live

tasks.name: 2-step resignation — manager meeting request before the form
tasks.body: Built the pre-submit meeting-request gate for offboarding
tasks.summary:
- Added MEETING_REQUESTED/ACCEPTED/DECLINED statuses, columns (migration) and endpoints: request, accept, decline-with-reason, cancel
- Employee My Offboarding page gates the resignation form behind a manager meeting request (waiting / declined / accepted states)
- Manager/HR Accept & Decline-with-reason panel; meeting notifications are in-app only with HR fallback
- Fixed rejected resignation to return the employee to step 1

tasks.name: Professional offboarding email template + letter polish
tasks.body: Reusable branded HTML email for all offboarding notifications
tasks.summary:
- Built one reusable HTML email shell (logo header, clean body card, footer) with the Monarch logo embedded inline (CID)
- Routed all offboarding emails through it (plain text -> branded HTML) and used 'Monarch Innovation Private Limited' in the signature
- Sent a live preview to verify rendering; finished the experience/relieving letter formatting and pronoun polish

tasks.name: Offboarding UX — batch sign-off, sidebar, tooling
tasks.body: Stage-7 batch sign-off and sidebar/tooling improvements
tasks.summary:
- No-dues clearance now uses a Save-changes batch sign-off (one combined notification, not one email per department)
- Expanded the Workspace sidebar section by default
- Installed the shadcn skill in mipl-frontend-next; merged latest dev into both repos (no conflicts) and verified builds
